what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates an attachment identifier with a target board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-bd818f7f
No body content beyond the frontmatter block
standouts: Uses a board:// URI to reference an external board item
Attachment record is purely a pointer with no embedded item content
conventions: Channel attachment records stored as Markdown files in channel-memory/channel_attachments
notes: A lightweight metadata stub linking attachment att-4c3684ef to board item item-bd818f7f in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does the referenced board item item-bd818f7f represent?
Is this attachment intended to be rendered inline, or only used as a provenance/reference pointer?
purpose_vs_actual: The declared attachment_type board_items matches the act of pointing to a board item, but the file contains only the reference, not the board item content itself.
intention_signals: To create a durable, discoverable link between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the attachment can be retrieved or contextualized later.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme for cross-entity referencing within the ledger.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped association between an attachment identifier and a board item, supporting navigation and provenance without embedding the referenced content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file recording an id, channel, attachment type, target board item URI, and creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference from a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item.
